{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320151956DDF3B1C49982A26FFDA4"}"},"total":583},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7515655507409519385","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看好看，好久没看到这么精彩的军绿小说了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749881735,"group_id":"7505477672013679678","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5NiPE1uDXKVvUW66NYCWPg=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"111172682598","user_name":"御剑飞刀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111172682598","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7505477672013679678","book_info":{"abstract":"秦天穿越到特种兵综合世界，成为一个普通连队的老兵。
原本秦天打算平平淡淡渡过这一世，没想到上面忽然下达命令，让他参加对女兵的筛选、集训？
对于那群娇贵的小公主、大小姐，秦天可没有兴趣去当她们的副教官。
直到一通久违的电话到来，秦天才幡然醒悟，他还是无法逃脱世俗的约束。
既然如此，那就轰轰烈烈的过完这一世吧！
范天雷：“老班长，你为什么甘愿一辈子当一个士官？”
叶寸心：“什么？他是我舅舅！？”
雷战：“这老班长真狠，对队员狠， 对自己更狠！”
狗头老高：“老班长，好久不见！”
